data.name: Champion of Venus: Tayla's Big Adventure
data.detailed_description:
An erotic visual novel about a busty bimbo and a sex tournament, illustrated by your favourite western hentai artists. It's hella long, hella funny, and hella horny!



Tayla is a nobody. She doesn't have the powers of a Champion, or a goddess watching over her. What she does have is a rockin' bod, a bottomless libido, and a talent for draining her partners.

Luckily for her, she can stretch herself around any phallus-shaped object... but even so, the coming trials might prove too great even for her.

When Tayla finds herself in the midst of an underground sex battle royale, she'll need your help to guide her to victory.



  • Over 100,000 words of pure obscenity.
  • 55+ ero scenes.
  • More than 500 pictures by your favourite western hentai artists.
  • 33 characters.
  • Numerous animated scenes.

Tayla's Big Adventure is the sequel to Champion of Venus, but playing the first game isn't necessary. There's an optional summary in-game.

data.short_description: Tayla's Big Adventure is an erotic visual novel about a busty bimbo 'fighting' the divine Champions of the gods of lust. It's hella long, hella funny, and hella horny!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
